zapenuDescription: Complete backend platform for delivery startup supporting +10k items per store with microservices architecture.
zapenuChallenge: Design a scalable architecture to handle thousands of products per store with fast response times and efficient communication between services.
zapenuSolution: Implemented microservices with gRPC communication, optimized relational model in PostgreSQL, and file system in Cloudflare R2. TSOA/Swagger for automatic documentation.
deployBotDescription: Telegram bot to automate Docker deployments on AWS EC2
deployBotFullDescription: Automated system that reduces Docker application deployment time on AWS from 20 minutes to 3 minutes via Telegram bot.
fittrackerDescription: Telegram bot for personal workout tracking and monitoring
fittrackerFullDescription: Complete exercise tracking application with multi-user authentication system and progress analysis.
tmuxConfigDescription: Custom tmux configuration for terminal productivity
tmuxConfigFullDescription: Optimized tmux configuration file for backend development workflows with custom keyboard shortcuts.
nvimConfigDescription: Complete Neovim configuration for backend development
nvimConfigFullDescription: Neovim setup with LSP, tree-sitter, autocomplete, and essential plugins for modern development.
orderPlatformDescription: Distributed e-commerce platform with Event Sourcing and Saga Pattern
orderPlatformFullDescription: Complete order management system with microservices architecture, implementing Event Sourcing, Saga Pattern for distributed compensation, and Outbox Pattern for reliable event publishing.
